coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 7-group, 93-node closure.
validation: The authored 4x4 grid matches Blender exactly at 4,736 vertices and 4,096 faces. Refreshing its 74-vertex embedded seed from the source .blend's original float32 coordinates removes the former 0.0004-unit drift introduced when the graph multiplied six-decimal JSON coordinates by 1,000. All 4,736 evaluated vertex coordinates are now bit-for-bit identical to Blender. Point-cloud components are retained for Geometry Nodes field and instancing evaluation but omitted from the final evaluated mesh, matching Blender.

material.contract: Blender unassigned neutral surface: linear 0.8 base color, metalness 0, roughness 0.5
material.residual: Renderer-specific Area/RectArea light units and local area-light response differ after the asset-size exposure calibration.
